## Feature Summary

Describe the feature you want.

## Problem It Solves

Explain the workflow problem or limitation this feature would solve.

Describe how the feature should work.

## Alternative Ideas

List any other approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, screenshots, examples, or notes if helpful.
